advancement.dawnoftimebuilder.chinese.th: Mattone dopo mattone. La storia non si costruisce da sola.
advancement.dawnoftimebuilder.general.ha: Ogni sedia, ogni tavolo, ogni cuscino. Il comfort è una forma d'arte.
advancement.dawnoftimebuilder.general.li: Accendi ogni camino e ogni fonte di luce utilizzando una pietra focaia e un acciarino.
advancement.dawnoftimebuilder.general.ti: Il pavimento è la tua tela.
advancement.dawnoftimebuilder.japanese.s: Bottiglie di sake sufficienti per dimenticare persino il proprio nome.
advancement.dawnoftimebuilder.master_of_: Un vero architetto delle civiltà. Hai esplorato ogni angolo del mondo antico.
advancement.dawnoftimebuilder.persian.go: Raccogliere ogni variante dei blocchi in ottone liscio e placcato.
advancement.dawnoftimebuilder.roman.glor: Portare abbastanza statue di Marte per ricostruire Roma.
advancement.dawnoftimebuilder.root.descr: Raccogli, crea e esplora i blocchi di "Dawn of Time".
advancement.dawnoftimebuilder.root.title: L'alba dei tempi

tooltip.dawnoftimebuilder.add_column: Use SHIFT + RIGHT-CLICK on this block to add or remove a column in the middle.
tooltip.dawnoftimebuilder.beam: Use SHIFT + RIGHT-CLICK on this block to remove its base if it has one.
tooltip.dawnoftimebuilder.charred_spruce: Use RIGHT-CLICK on this block to add a column. Use SHIFT remove it.
tooltip.dawnoftimebuilder.climbing_plant: This block supports climbing plants. Use RIGHT-CLICK with lighter to interrupt plant growth. In Creative, use RIGHT-CLICK and SHIFT + RIGHT-CLICK with an empty hand to increase or decrease plant's age.
tooltip.dawnoftimebuilder.column: Use RIGHT-CLICK on this block to increase its size or SHIFT + RIGHT-CLICK to reduce its size.
tooltip.dawnoftimebuilder.crop: Use a lighter on this plant to prevent its growth. Then, in Creative, you can use RIGHT-CLICK and SHIFT + RIGHT-CLICK to control the age.
tooltip.dawnoftimebuilder.fireplace: Can be ignited with a lighter, fireball or flaming arrow, it can be extinguished with a lighter, snowball, splash or normal water potion
tooltip.dawnoftimebuilder.iron_portculli: Use a redstone impulse on a portcullis block to open it, and all adjacent portcullis blocks.
tooltip.dawnoftimebuilder.limestone_garg: In Creative, use a lighter on this block to stabilise its flow of drops. Then, you can use RIGHT-CLICK and SHIFT + RIGHT-CLICK to control the flow.
tooltip.dawnoftimebuilder.moraq_mosaic_c: Place a block with your cursor on the left or the right side to change the direction of the pattern.
tooltip.dawnoftimebuilder.sided_window: Use SHIFT to center the window in the middle of a block. The window will be against a side otherwise.
tooltip.dawnoftimebuilder.silk_cocoons: The silk worms created delicate cocoons in the stick bundle. They can be combined to create silk.
tooltip.dawnoftimebuilder.silk_worm_eggs: The worms in these Silk moth's eggs would need some mulberry leaves when they hatch...
tooltip.dawnoftimebuilder.silk_worm_hatc: These eggs will hatch when placed on a tray.
tooltip.dawnoftimebuilder.silk_worms: After eating so many Mulberry Leaves on the tray, these worms are ready to weave their cocoon into a stick bundle.
tooltip.dawnoftimebuilder.small_tatami_m: SHIFT + RIGHT-CLICK with an empty hand to roll this tatami. Up to 3 tatamis can be rolled in the same block. A tatami directly under a chain will be rolled vertically. Place this tatami on a Spruce Planks block to be able to put decoration blocks on it.
tooltip.dawnoftimebuilder.tatami_mat: SHIFT + RIGHT-CLICK with an empty hand to roll this tatami. Up to 3 tatamis can be rolled in the same block. Place this tatami on Spruce Planks blocks to be able to put decoration blocks on it.
tooltip.dawnoftimebuilder.youtube_playli: Impara a costruire utilizzando i mattoncini!
